name: Stacking T alent Benefits
description:
Multiple talents my provide overlapping benefits. If this is the case, here's how they interact, with the proviso that the GM
can disallow anything they believe will produce an overly powerful combination.

description:
If two talents say you must take a special minor or major action, these are generally separate actions, and their bene -
fits do not stack with each other. For instance, if you have a talent that allows you to use a minor action to attack, and
one which allows

effects: The benefit gained when you become a novice.

name: Dama ge Bonuses
description:
These stack with each other unless the GM rules otherwise.
ReRolls
If multiple talents allow you to reroll the same test, each additional talent adds a +1 bonus to the reroll. You cannot reroll
the exact same test more than once.

description:
Stunt Die bonuses do not stack.
Test Bonuses
These stack with each other unless the GM rules otherwise.

While Mages have access to magical powers through their class, others may gain mystical talents as well. Sometimes

combining what they know w

You gain one Expert spell of any arcana. Alterna tively, you may take two more Novice spells from any arcana.
